records.ety: [L. Cynosura theconstellation Cynosure, Gr. <?/<?/<?/<?/<?/ dog's tail, the constellation Cynosure; <?/<?/<?/<?/, <?/<?/<?/<?/, dog + o'yra` tail. SeeCynic.]

defs: The constellation of the Lesser Bear (Ursa Minor), to which, as containing the polar star, the eyes of mariners and travelers were often directed.
Anything to which attention is strongly turned; a center of attraction.
quotes: Where perhaps some beauty lies, The cynosure of neighboring eyes.
